query: DELETE FROM view_counts WHERE count_id LIKE 'cnt_%' AND (video_id, date) IN (SELECT video_id, date FROM (SELECT video_id, date FROM view_counts WHERE count_id LIKE 'vc_%') AS vc_rows);
